title: As A Sensor Should
description: Renames minecrafts "Daylight Detector" to its proper name, the Daylight Sensor.
body:
A simple resource pack renaming the "Daylight dEtEcToR" to its VASTLY superior name, the **_Daylight Sensor_**.

Earlier, on this very day(3/11/2024), on a dark- very blusterous morn, I noticed, much to my horror, a distinct lack of such a pack. Upon noticing this clearly heinous crime, which could clearly be thought of by only the most vile of villains, I knew deep within my heart of hearts that I MUST right this wretched, horrid, wrong.



\- Saving minecrafters from saddened fates since march 2024.
